frontmatter.title: Q3 Platform Demo — Billing Module
frontmatter.summary: A walkthrough of the billing module's invoice workflow, covering proration and the admin panel.

blocks.label: spoken
blocks.text: Thanks for joining — today we'll walk through the billing module, focusing on the new invoice workflow and how proration is applied.

blocks.label: visual
blocks.text: Title card, then a cut to the presenter's screen share of the admin dashboard.

blocks.label: spoken
blocks.text: We open the invoice editor and apply proration before sending. The service call underneath is a straightforward async create.

blocks.label: on_screen
blocks.text:
Invoices → Create → "Apply proration" checkbox
code: InvoiceService.CreateAsync(...)

blocks.label: visual
blocks.text: Presenter navigates the admin panel, opens the invoice editor, and toggles the proration checkbox before saving.

blocks.label: spoken
blocks.text: That's the core flow — happy to take questions on edge cases like mid-cycle plan changes.

blocks.label: visual
blocks.text: Presenter returns to the title card.

provenance: Generated by **mdreel** from your uploaded recording. The source video was deleted after processing per the default retention policy.
